The loan is made on December 17 and lasts 120 days. Counting 120 days from December 17 in a non-leap year: December has 14 days remaining (17th to 31st), January has 31, February has 28, and March has 31, totaling 104 days, leaving 16 days into April, which gives April 16. Therefore, the correct answer is E.  

\boxed{E}
